series_metadata.series_description: Includes prined photos as well as negatives and electronic files and related materials

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until no longer of administrative value and then, if the records appear to have historical value to State Archives. If no historical value is perceived by agency staff, destroy ; Electronic: Until no longer of administrative value and then, if the records appear to have historical value to State Archives. If no historical value is perceived by agency staff, destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
